caveat: Next-token top-1 can be punctuation or a phrase even when the target wins the two-way metric.
Only compares the labeled target against one distractor.
Three templates are a smoke test for wording robustness, not a paraphrase universe.
A readable lens preference is not a causal readout path.
Scoped to selected base-template facts, sites, and the target-vs-distractor metric.
High control recovery weakens the specificity of the patch claim.
A monitor direction is not itself evidence of causal use.
Near-zero selectivity is an informative negative.
